mapper.select: /* REC_CER_Dao_retrieveRecCerList */ WITH MONTH_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt} || '01', 0, 6), 'yyyyMM'), LEVEL - 1), 'yyyyMM') AS mt FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt} || '12', 0, 6), 'yyyyMM'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt} || '01', 0, 6), 'yyyyMM')) + 1 ) SELECT mt AS ym, smlhp, snpw, wdpw, tdpw, ovsea, ROUND(( NVL(smlhp, 0) + NVL(snpw, 0) + NVL(wdpw, 0) + NVL(tdpw, 0) + NVL(ovsea, 0) ), 0) AS sum FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(MONTH_LIST DATAS) */ MONTH_LIST.mt, DATAS.setcsc_nm, DATAS.amt FROM ( SELECT (rec_delng_year || rec_delng_mt) AS mt, cmmn_cd_nm AS setcsc_nm, SUM(amt) AS amt FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(B D A C) */ A.rec_delng_year, A.rec_delng_mt, D.cmmn_cd_nm, A.rec_accnut_snrn AS amt FROM tm_cl22001 A, ( SELECT cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2003' ) B, WRO.tc_eg10101 C, ( SELECT cmmn_cd, DECODE(cmmn_cd, '0004', '태양광', '0005', '태양광', '0007', '보소수력', cmmn_cd_nm ) AS cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE sys_div_cd = 'WRO' AND cls_cd = 'WRO_3003' ) D WHERE A.rec_eqp_cd_nm = B.cmmn_cd AND B.usr_dfn_vu1 = C.elcpwstn_cd(+) AND C.elcpwstn_cls_cd = D.cmmn_cd(+) AND A.rec_delng_year = #{strtDt} UNION ALL SELECT /*+ LEADING(B D A C) */ A.rec_delng_year, A.rec_delng_mt, D.cmmn_cd_nm, A.rec_excclc_tamt AS amt FROM tm_cl22002 A, ( SELECT cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2003' ) B, WRO.tc_eg10101 C, ( SELECT cmmn_cd, DECODE(cmmn_cd, '0004', '태양광', '0005', '태양광', '0007', '소수력', cmmn_cd_nm ) AS cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE sys_div_cd = 'WRO' AND cls_cd = 'WRO_3003' ) D WHERE A.rec_eqp_cd_nm = B.cmmn_cd(+) AND B.usr_dfn_vu1 = C.elcpwstn_cd(+) AND C.elcpwstn_cls_cd = D.cmmn_cd(+) AND A.rec_delng_year = #{strtDt} ) GROUP BY rec_delng_year || rec_delng_mt, cmmn_cd_nm UNION ALL SELECT /*+ LEADING(B A) */ SUBSTR(A.cer_delng_de, 0, 6) AS cer_delng_mt, MAX(B.cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, SUM(A.cer_amt) AS cer_amt FROM tm_cl23001 A, ( SELECT cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_9002' ) B WHERE A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.cmmn_cd(+) AND A.cer_delng_de BETWEEN #{strtDt} || '0101' AND #{strtDt} || '1231' GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.cer_delng_de, 0, 6), B.cmmn_cd ) DATAS, MONTH_LIST WHERE MONTH_LIST.mt = DATAS.mt(+) ) PIVOT ( SUM(amt) FOR setcsc_nm IN ( '소수력' AS smlhp, '태양광' AS snpw, '풍력' AS wdpw, '시화조력' AS tdpw, '파트린드' AS ovsea ) ) ORDER BY ym
